items.text: US launches 5th straight day of strikes on Iran; Hormuz naval blockade in force, IMO warns transit unsafe
EIA data: crude stocks -1.7M bbl (smaller draw than forecast), distillates unexpectedly build +4.56M bbl
Trump drops planned 20% fee on Hormuz-transiting cargo, citing future Gulf investment in the US
US June PPI surprises soft (core +0.2%); Fed hike odds trimmed, DXY slips below 101
Freeport LNG maintenance turnaround (through Aug) curbs feedgas even as storage surplus widens to 185 Bcf
